description_for_human: India's free AI scam checker. Check suspicious messages, links, UPI IDs, phone numbers, and detect deepfakes. 12 Indian languages.
description_for_model: Chetana checks Indian digital scams. Use it to: (1) scan suspicious SMS/WhatsApp messages for scam patterns, (2) check URLs for phishing, (3) verify UPI IDs against fraud databases, (4) lookup phone numbers for scam reports, (5) detect deepfake images/videos/voice. Returns a risk verdict (LOW_RISK / UNCLEAR / SUSPICIOUS) with explanation. Free. Privacy-first. Supports Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, and 7 more Indian languages.
